title: Loki’s Past Deepens
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Usopp, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 63 YEARS AGO...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Elbaf's past

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Lord JORULL!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: JARUL, THE OLDEST MAN IN THE PRESENT DAY, LOST HIS PARTNER.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Cascade beard JORUL was struck down dead...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...by the hands of a certain young girl.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Her name was Charlotte Linlin...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A mere human, yet she left a large part of a giant village in ruins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: she would later go on to become an emperor, earning the epithet "BIG MOM."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That same year, Elbaf faced a string of tragedies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was calamity after calamity. Sudden fires, windstorms, and bitter cold waves devastated the crops.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The abnormal weather also brought fishing to a halt.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This once magnificent land had fallen into famine.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now do you see!! This is all that child's doing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This land was cursed because you all failed to kill it immediately!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No... surely it's just a coincidence...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: CRA SH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: GOO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Gyaaaah! He's staring at me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: PRINCE LOK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take it away!! Don't ever let that monster near me again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WAAA H!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PRINCE LOK!!! You have to keep away from your mother's room!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WEEEE NWHH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gouge out those monstrous eyes!! If left unchecked, his curse will grow till it brings about this nation's collapse!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: EEEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHA NANK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Waaaaah!!! I'm hungry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, sweetie, that was the last bit of bread we had...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're going reaving?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We could easily steal what we need from the humans...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ain't that how it's always been in Elbaf's history?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be ridiculous!! A senseless raid on them would only bring shame to Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's the law of the land now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Those bastards from Hunter's village are attacking!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What are they!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It seems they've hit other villages too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quick, arm yourselves!! Don't let them look the village!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Internal giant struggles weren't unheard of...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...During desperate times.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But these incidents only...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...resulted in making the period more severe and bloody.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The country was engaged in chaos and misery...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard a rumor about that princeling born in the castle...

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
